en: Now I watched when the Lamb opened one of the seven seals, and I heard one of the four living creatures say with a voice like thunder, "Come!"
zh: 羊羔揭開了七印的第一個印的時候，我觀看，就聽見四個活物中的一個，發出好像雷轟的聲響，說：“你來！”

en: And I looked, and behold, a white horse! And its rider had a bow, and a crown was given to him, and he came out conquering, and to conquer.
zh: 我觀看，見有一匹白馬；騎在馬上的拿著弓，有冠冕賜給他，他就出去，得勝並且要再得勝。

en: When he opened the second seal, I heard the second living creature say, "Come!"
zh: 羊羔揭開了第二個印的時候，我聽見第二個活物說：“你來！”

en: And out came another horse, bright red. Its rider was permitted to take peace from the earth, so that men should slay one another, and he was given a great sword.
zh: 就另有一匹紅馬出來，騎在馬上的得了權柄，可以從地上奪去和平，使人互相殘殺，又有一把大刀賜給他。

en: When he opened the third seal, I heard the third living creature say, "Come!" And I looked, and behold, a black horse! And its rider had a pair of scales in his hand.
zh: 羊羔揭開了第三個印的時候，我聽見第三個活物說：“你來！”我觀看，見有一匹黑馬；騎在馬上的，手中拿著天平。

en: And I heard what seemed to be a voice in the midst of the four living creatures, saying, "A quart of wheat for a denarius, and three quarts of barley for a denarius, and do not harm the oil and wine!"
zh: 我聽見在四個活物中間，仿佛有聲音說：“一公升小麥賣一個銀幣，三公升大麥賣一個銀幣，油和酒也不可糟蹋。”

en: When he opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth living creature say, "Come!"
zh: 羊羔揭開了第四個印的時候，我聽見第四個活物的聲音說：“你來！”

en: And I looked, and behold, a pale horse! And its rider's name was Death, and Hades followed him. And they were given authority over a fourth of the earth, to kill with sword and with famine and with pestilence and by wild beasts of the earth.
zh: 我觀看，見有一匹灰馬；騎在馬上的，名字叫作“死”。陰間也跟隨著他。他們得了權柄可以管轄地上的四分之一，又要用刀劍、饑荒、瘟疫和地上的野獸去殺人。

en: When he opened the fifth seal, I saw under the altar the souls of those who had been slain for the word of God and for the witness they had borne.
zh: 羊羔揭開了第五個印的時候，我看見祭壇底下，有為了 神的道，並且為了自己所作的見證而被殺的人的靈魂。

en: They cried out with a loud voice, "O Sovereign Lord, holy and true, how long before you will judge and avenge our blood on those who dwell on the earth?"
zh: 他們大聲喊叫，說：“聖潔真實的主啊！你不審判住在地上的人，給我們伸流血的冤，要到幾時呢？”

en: Then they were each given a white robe and told to rest a little longer, until the number of their fellow servants and their brothers should be complete, who were to be killed as they themselves had been.
zh: 於是有白袍賜給他們各人，又有話吩咐他們要安息一會兒，等到那些與他們同作僕人和弟兄，像他們一樣將要被殺的人，湊滿了數目的時候。

en: When he opened the sixth seal, I looked, and behold, there was a great earthquake, and the sun became black as sackcloth, the full moon became like blood,
zh: 羊羔揭開了第六個印的時候，我觀看，大地震就發生了。太陽變黑，像粗糙的黑毛布；整個月亮變紅，像血一樣；

en: and the stars of the sky fell to the earth as the fig tree sheds its winter fruit when shaken by a gale.
zh: 天上的星辰墜落在地上，像無花果樹被大風搖動，落下還沒有成熟的果子。

en: The sky vanished like a scroll that is being rolled up, and every mountain and island was removed from its place.
zh: 天隱退了，像書被捲起來一樣；山嶺和海島都從原處移去了。

en: Then the kings of the earth and the great ones and the generals and the rich and the powerful, and everyone, slave and free, hid themselves in the caves and among the rocks of the mountains,
zh: 地上的君王、大臣、軍長、財主、勇士和所有作奴隸的、自由的，都藏在山洞和巖穴裡。

en: calling to the mountains and rocks, "Fall on us and hide us from the face of him who is seated on the throne, and from the wrath of the Lamb,
zh: 他們向山嶺和巖石說：“倒在我們身上吧！把我們藏起來，躲避坐在寶座上那位的面，和羊羔的震怒！

en: for the great day of their wrath has come, and who can stand?"
zh: 因為他們震怒的大日子來到了，誰能站立得住呢？”
